name: Caribbean Crabmeat Canapes
recipeIngredient: 2 cups crabmeat (fresh or canned), fresh or canned
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 2 tablespoons butter in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onion and garlic to the skillet and sauté until translucent.
3. Stir in coconut and continue cooking until lightly browned.
4. In a separate bowl, combine crabmeat, egg, heavy cream, curry powder, and salt.
5. Mix in the onion, garlic, and coconut mixture until well incorporated.
6. Shape the mixture into 30 one-inch balls.
7. Roll each ball in crushed pork rinds.
8. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat.
9. Brown the crabmeat balls in the hot oil for about 2-3 minutes on each side.
10. Drain the cooked crabmeat balls on paper towels to remove excess oil.
11. Serve with toothpicks.
